tone: friendly-professional, second-person, conversational. No exclamation marks. No emoji. Avoid marketing-speak inflation.
formality: Simplified Chinese (Mainland). Guide/explainer content addresses the reader as 你 (warm, direct) — this matches all shipped ZH guide entries. Use natural Mainland vocabulary and full-width punctuation （，。：“”——）. Keep sentences readable, not stiff. NOTE: messages/zh.json UI copy uses 您 (formal) per its own namespace convention — that is a separate register; do not change it and do not import 您 into guide prose.
preserve: All currency notations (THB, ฿, USD, $) where they appear as source data
All numerals as half-width Arabic digits (do not convert to Chinese numerals 一二三)

terminology.note: caddie. Caddie fee = 球童费; caddie tip = 球童小费.
golf clubs. Golf bag = 球包.
budget carrier / LCC. Gloss once as 廉价航空（LCC）.
indoor golf simulator; 模拟器 for simulator.

currency.format: Half-width Arabic digits + 泰铢 (Hanzi), no space: 1,200泰铢. Thousands separator comma.
currency.units: kg rendered as 公斤 (e.g. 6公斤).
currency.note: RULING: guide/explainer content spells the currency as 泰铢. The Latin 'THB' abbreviation is co-present in the small ZH corpus but 泰铢 is the prose norm; keep 泰铢 for new content. messages/zh.json UI copy is a separate namespace — leave it as-is. ZH is OUT OF SCOPE for the Workstream B pipeline (TH/KO/JA only); this glossary governs hand-authored ZH guide batches.

conventions.ranges: En dash – (U+2013) between values, no spaces: 25–30公斤, 4–7公斤, 20–35公斤.
conventions.numerals: Half-width Arabic digits only; never Chinese numeral words for figures.
conventions.as_of_format: 截至2026年7月 — no parentheses, placed inline (e.g. 每日1,200泰铢起，截至2026年7月).

honesty_constraints.required_scoping: Any negative claim about coach languages must be scoped to LENGOLF (e.g. 'LENGOLF没有中文教练或中文课程'), never stated city-wide about Bangkok. City-wide statements may only be POSITIVE and general. NOTE: no coach-language claim exists in the current 3-entry ZH corpus; this constraint is provided by analogy with the shipped JA/KO lessons entries for when a ZH lessons page is authored.
honesty_constraints.allowed_language_support: 预订与咨询可通过 LINE @lengolf 用中文办理 (booking/consultation in Chinese via LINE @lengolf). Also: on-screen simulator numbers help across the language barrier. Do NOT claim Chinese-language lessons or Chinese coaches.
honesty_constraints.linter_hint: Flag each forbidden_claims string for human REVIEW (not auto-reject) when it appears WITHOUT LENGOLF-scoped negation nearby (没有/不设 within the same sentence/paragraph) AND the LINE @lengolf allowance. Honesty rules, not lexical bans.

transliterations.note: ZH keeps station/venue names in Latin (Chidlom, The Mercury Ville) rather than transliterating; only Bangkok is localized (曼谷). Airline and brand names are glossed once with the Latin name in full-width parens on first use, e.g. 泰国国际航空（Thai Airways）, then either form. Keep LENGOLF, len.golf, BTS, MRT, PGA, LINE @lengolf, len.golf, and Latin product names (Callaway, Majesty) verbatim.

seo_norms.title_display_target: ~28–30 Hanzi characters; front-load the target query, then a descriptive tail after an em dash — (shipped ZH guide titles run 22–27 chars).
seo_norms.meta_note: Hook + target query in the first ~40 Hanzi; ZH meta truncates around 78 characters on mobile SERP. Shipped guide metas run ~70–80 chars.
seo_norms.front_load: Lead with the reader's query (例：高尔夫球杆托运行李费用), not the brand.

style_notes: Address the reader as 你 in guide prose (never 您 — that is UI-namespace register).
Full-width punctuation throughout: （），。：“”；—— and full-width parens for glosses.
Half-width Arabic digits with Chinese units and no space (6公斤, 1,200泰铢).
En dash – for numeric ranges; full-width em dash —— for asides/explanatory breaks.
No exclamation marks, no emoji. Warm, direct, plain Mainland Chinese — avoid Taiwan/HK lexical variants.
